title: Chart & Manifest Backfill: Deployment
intent: Ensure 04_deployment/ has complete chart.yaml (WAS) and manifest.yaml (WIE) for all shards, contracts, and implementations. Deployment configurations, Helm charts, and release pipelines.
acceptance_checks: chart.yaml exists and is fully populated in 04_deployment/
manifest.yaml exists and is fully populated in 04_deployment/
All module references resolve to existing paths
All local gates (Policy, SoT, QA) pass
No new files created outside of scope_paths_allow
SoT scorecard shows PASS for all defined rules
